result.stdout:
Description:
  Neutrino is a lightning-speed file searcher.

Usage:
  Neutrino.Cli <file-name-pattern> <text-search-pattern> [options]

Arguments:
  <file-name-pattern>    A glob pattern to match file names. [default: **/*]
  <text-search-pattern>  Specifies a full-text-search pattern. See the documentation on the pattern format. []

Options:
  --path <path>              Specifies the directory to search in. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-neutrino.cli-1.0.0-99537fa6e5f9469eb4043585efd77860]
  --json                     Formats the output as JSON.
  -c, --conc <conc>          Specifies the degree of concurrency to perform operations. [default: 2]
  -s, --max-size <max-size>  Max file size for full-text-search operations. Valid sizes are in [KB, MB, GB, etc.] [default: 1MB]
  --version                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
